tasks.description:
{
  "plan_summary": "Analyze test requirement from CLI input and generate placeholder execution plan structure for unknown-project.

feature_slices.description: Initialize empty project root with baseline structure, README, and configuration for chosen stack based on spine requirements
acceptance: ls shows standard project files created
README describes the 'Test requirement from CLI' use case

feature_slices.description: Build CLI parser and entry point that accepts 'Test requirement from CLI' input and routes to analysis phases
acceptance: CLI accepts and echoes the test requirement string without error
Output matches required JSON structure for downstream phases

feature_slices.description: Implement risk assessment generator that produces valid JSON output for ambiguous/sparse CLI requirements
acceptance: Produces schema-compliant risk JSON from the test requirement
Captures ambiguities and suggested phases correctly

feature_slices.description: Implement tech research module that detects empty project state and outputs baseline stack recommendations
acceptance: Detects empty project and returns recommended scaffolding steps
